# TextCursor

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="TextCursor icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="TextCursor" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; stroke-linejoin=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M17 22h-1a4 4 0 0 1-4-4V6a4 4 0 data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" data-di-preview="true" aria-label="TextCursor preview"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="TextCursor icon"></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-controls"><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Size</span><input data-di-size="true" class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Stroke</span><input data-di-stroke="true" type="number" min="1" max="12" value="2"></label></div></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-output"><pre class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
select

## Categories
text, cursors

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/text-cursor)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TextCursor;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TextCursor { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
